scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,bank,admin -c blue,cyan,green "node server.js" "cd bank && npx vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5001" "cd admin && npx vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5002"
scripts.build: cd bank && npx vite build && cd ../admin && npx vite build
scripts.setup: npm install && cd bank && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
